git add cli/internal/server/server_test.go && git commit -m "test(mcp): add ddx_worker_list/show/log MCP tool coverage [.execute-bead-wt-.execute-bead-wt-ddx-44236615-20260429T185004-ffa9adf1-3fbadf19]

The ddx_worker_list/show/log MCP tools (registered in commit 88baa4c3)
already mirror the HTTP /api/agent/workers endpoints, but had no
behavioral test coverage beyond name registration. Add direct
tools/call tests for each tool covering the empty-list, missing-id,
and unknown-id paths so the FEAT-002/013 read-coverage gap closure
is verifiable from the test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"

data.text: Committed. The `ddx_worker_list/show/log` MCP tools already exist in server.go (registered, dispatched, and implemented in prior commit 88baa4c3 which is part of base e15bac4e). This re-attempt addresses the prior review's "no implementation in diff" finding by adding direct `tools/call` test coverage in `cli/internal/server/server_test.go` for each of the three tools (empty-list, missing-id, unknown-id paths). All hooks pass.
